    lfd     f0,-24(r4); fIsPtrOp
    stfd    f1,-16(r4); fIsPtrOp

    stfd    f1,-48(r4); fIsPtrOp

    stfd    f0,-56(r4); fIsPtrOp

    stfd    f1,-80(r4); fIsPtrOp
    stfd    f0,-72(r4); fIsPtrOp

    stfd    f0,-88(r4); fIsPtrOp
    lfd     f1,-128(r4); fIsPtrOp
    lfd     f0,-120(r4); fIsPtrOp
    stfd    f1,-112(r4); fIsPtrOp
    stfd    f0,-104(r4); fIsPtrOp
    addi    r4,r4,-128
    bdnz    B34
:{0004}::::LOOPWEIGHT=918025
B36: Succ={B38 B37 } Pred={B34 } Labels={L37 }

    andi.   r3,r3,0x7
    bt      cr0,eq,B38
:{0004}::::LOOPWEIGHT=65618
B37: Succ={B22 } Pred={B33 B36 } Labels={L38 }

    mtctr   r3
:{000c}::::LOOPWEIGHT=1821933920
B22: Succ={B38 B22 } Pred={B37 B22 } Labels={L10 }

    lfd     f1,-16(r4); fIsPtrOp
    lfd     f0,-8(r4); fIsPtrOp
    stfd    f1,0(r4); fIsPtrOp
    stfd    f0,8(r4); fIsPtrOp
    addi    r4,r4,-16
    bdnz    B22
:{0004}::::LOOPWEIGHT=57
B38: Succ={B24 } Pred={B36 B22 } Labels={L39 }

:{000c}::::LOOPWEIGHT=0
B24: Succ={B25 } Pred={B38 B21 } Labels={L28 }

    lfd     f1,temp(r1)
    lfd     f0,temp+8(r1)
    stfd    f1,0(r30); fIsPtrOp
    stfd    f0,8(r30); fIsPtrOp
:{0004}::::LOOPWEIGHT=836239360
B25: Succ={B26 } Pred={B24 B20 } Labels={L12 }

    addi    r30,r30,16
    addi    r8,r8,1
:{0004}::::LOOPWEIGHT=0
B26: Succ={B27 B15 } Pred={B14 B25 } Labels={L13 }

    cmp     cr0,r8,r31
    bt      cr0,lt,B15
:{000c}::::LOOPWEIGHT=260

    rlwinm  r0,r29,4,20,27
    addi    r3,r1,entries
    lbzx    r3,(r3,r0); fIsPtrOp
:{000e}::::LOOPWEIGHT=0
B28: Succ={} Pred={B27 B4 } Labels={L17 }

    lmw     r24,1952(r1); fIsVolatile; fIsPtrOp
    lwz     r0,1988(r1); fIsPtrOp
    addi    r1,r1,1984; fSideEffects
    mtlr    r0
    blr     ; fIsLive
